qids.subject: Algorithms
qids.prose: We are given tasks . The execution of each task requires one unit of time. We can execute one task at a time. Each task has a profit and a deadline . Profit is earned if the task is completed before the end of the unit of time. What is the maximum profit earned? A. B. C. D.
